prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
notes: Wave 0 rollback regression. Logged in as 최장희 (M365 Copilot 기본 model). Hard reload completed, no PIN modal. PII prompt typed into 'Copilot에 메시지 보내기' contenteditable input (id=65), submit button 보내기 (id=68, coords 1543,556) clicked successfully via label-based Click — prompt was submitted to backend (user bubble rendered with the PII prompt text at top of conversation pane). Copilot response bubble rendered with English error text 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' plus 다시 시도 / 피드백 보내기 buttons — NO Korean '차단' substring present, NO APF warning bubble injected. After 60s observation window, response remained 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' with no further DOM changes. Compared to #986 BREAKTHROUGH OK (handshake-gate + relaxed substring scan): the rollback regressed warning bubble rendering on m365_copilot — engine intercept apparently fired (backend response was suppressed/replaced) but the warning DOM injection path failed, leaving the user with a generic English M365 error message instead of the expected Korean APF block notice. Engine_intercept_fired=true (response was clearly intercepted — generic 'Something went wrong' is the M365 fallback when the upstream stream is cut), warning_rendered=false (no '차단' text anywhere on page).
